channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Everything new on Apple TV Plus in February 2025: The Gorge, Surface season 2, and more
item.description: From new episodes of Severance season 2 to the first Apple Movie Original of the year, here's what's coming to Apple TV Plus in February.
item.dc:creator: tom.power@futurenet.com (Tom Power), TechRadar

item.title: Eat this, Raspberry Pi 5: Here are 3 powerful AMD Ryzen Mini PCs that sell for under $180 and trounce more expensive SBCs
item.description: The Beelink GTR5, GenMachine, and BOSGAME E2 mini PCs all feature the Ryzen 5 3550H, outperforming entry-level Intel N-series processors
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Big Tech on the rise one year after Senate beat-down
item.description: With new dynamics emerging between Silicon Valley and Washington, some advocates for stronger social media regulations and parents are concerned their cause will get lost in the dust despite past momentum.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: OpenAI responds to the DeepSeek buzz by launching its latest o3-mini reasoning model for all users
item.description: The latest model plugged into ChatGPT offers improved reasoning at faster speeds, and everyone gets it.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: The Hawk Tuah girl remains radio silent after her crypto controversy
item.description: Has anyone checked in on Hawk Tuah girl? “When are we getting a new Talk Tuah episode? We’re starving for more Talk Tuah,” one X user posted yesterday. “Where is hawk tuah girl. Is she safe. Is she alright,” wrote another.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Airbnb CEO Brian Chesky explains how he helped Sam Altman during OpenAI’s 2023 board fiasco
item.description: After 17 years, Airbnb’s Brian Chesky is hitting reset—reinventing the business from the ground up and expanding the brand in unexpected ways.
item.dc:creator: Robert Safian, Fast Company

item.title: How AI can drive business transformation
item.description: The race to implement artificial intelligence solutions across the enterprise is in full swing. Most are using AI to drive down bottom-line costs by doing things quicker or more frequently than they did before.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: NFL officials spotting the football isn't going away despite several technological advances
item.description: The NFL will engage its Competition Committee on technology to take virtual line-to-gain measurements next season, but officials will continue to spot the football.
item.dc:creator: Rob Maaddi, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Snowden speaks out on Gabbard confirmation battle
item.description: Former National Security Agency contractor Edward Snowden defended former Rep. Tulsi Gabbard (Hawaii), President Trump's nominee to be director of national intelligence, following a fiery confirmation hearing in the Senate on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Dominick Mastrangelo, The Hill

item.title: Renault Group strengthens decarbonisation commitment
item.description: Renault Group is committed to taking actions that help reduce its carbon footprint. By using HP IT Asset Disposition Service, the company’s end-of-use devices are securely collected, sanitised, and restored or responsibly recycled by HP.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Meta’s Q4 profits exceed Wall Street’s expectations
item.description: Meta Platforms Inc. posted sharply higher profit and revenue for its fourth quarter on Wednesday, thanks to higher ad revenue on its social media properties, sending its shares up in after-hours trading even as it forecast increasing expenses on its artificial intelligence efforts.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Microsoft's Intelligent Cloud Segment Slows Down Amid Booming Demand for AI Infrastructure
item.description: Microsoft reported strong earnings, but growth in its intelligent cloud segment is slowing down despite increasing demand for AI infrastructure.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Apple's iPhone sales during the holiday season slipped despite a highly anticipated AI rollout
item.description: Apple on Thursday disclosed its iPhone sales dipped slightly during the holiday-season quarter, signaling a sluggish start to the trendsetting company’s effort to catch up to the rest of Big Tech in the race to bring artificial intelligence to the masses.
item.dc:creator: Michael Liedtke, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Italy blocks access to the Chinese AI application DeepSeek to protect users' data
item.description: Italy’s data protection authority has blocked use of Chinese tech startup DeepSeek’s AI application to protect Italians’ data and announced an investigation into the companies behind the chatbot.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Amazon sues state agency to block release of company records to Bezos-owned Washington Post
item.description: Amazon is suing a Washington state agency to prevent the release of some company materials to The Washington Post, the newspaper which is owned by Amazon founder Jeff Bezos.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Cisco touts ‘Internet of Agents’ for secure AI agent collaboration
item.description: When AI agents begin to proliferate, a new, open structure will be needed so they can securely communicate and collaborate together to solve complex problems, suggests Cisco.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: US cybersecurity agency's future role in elections remains murky under the Trump administration
item.description: The nation’s cybersecurity agency has played a critical role in helping states shore up the defenses of their voting systems, but its election mission appears uncertain amid sustained criticism from Republicans and key figures in the Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: Christina A. Cassidy, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: How DeepSeek will upend the AI industry
item.description: Chinese start-up DeepSeek’s cost-saving techniques for training and delivering generative AI (genAI) models could democratize the entire industry by lowering entry barriers for new AI companies.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: How execs can bridge the AI knowledge gap
item.description: From streamlining administrative tasks to enhancing brainstorming sessions, AI is becoming an essential workplace companion. Yet, despite its transformative promise, its integration isn’t as simple as flipping a switch.
item.dc:creator: Dave Grow, Fast Company

item.title: Microsoft first raises doubts about DeepSeek and then adds it to its cloud
item.description: Despite initiating a probe into Chinese AI startup DeepSeek, Microsoft has added the startup’s latest reasoning model R1, to its model catalog on Azure AI Foundry and GitHub.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Zuckerberg hails Trump administration on Meta earnings call
item.description: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg on Wednesday praised President Trump’s administration and said he looks forward to “redefining” the relationship the tech giant has with governments.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, The Hill

item.title: New Vatican document offers AI guidelines from warfare to health care
item.description: VATICAN CITY (AP) — A Vatican document released Tuesday offers wide-ranging ethical guidelines for the application of artificial intelligence in sectors from warfare to health care, with an underlying call that the burgeoning technology must be used as a tool to complement, and not replace, human in
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: DeepSeek's new AI chatbot and ChatGPT answer sensitive questions about China differently
item.description: HONG KONG (AP) — Chinese tech startup DeepSeek ’s new artificial intelligence chatbot has sparked discussions about the competition between China and the U.S. in AI development, with many users flocking to test the rival of OpenAI's ChatGPT. DeepSeek’s AI assistant was the No.
item.dc:creator: KANIS LEUNG, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Upstart Chinese AI company DeepSeek's founder started out as a low-key hedge fund entrepreneur
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — The 40-year-old founder of China’s DeepSeek, an AI startup that has startled markets with its capacity to compete with industry leaders like OpenAI, kept a low profile as he built up a hedge fund and then refined its quantitative models to branch into artificial intelligence.
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Fake toll road texts sweep America as Chinese scammers target US drivers
item.description: Toll road text scam: Fake messages claim unpaid fees, seek payment via fraudulent links. Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson says this scam is becoming increasingly sophisticated and widespread.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Endor Labs’ new tool helps enterprises track the AI models they use
item.description: Software supply chain security vendor Endor Labs has added another dimension to its products with Tuesday’s launch of AI Model Discovery, which will be part of its core open-source evaluation offering.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Salt Typhoon ignites new federal push for mobile security best practices
item.description: In the wake of the Salt Typhoon hack, agencies are looking to secure their mobile data using encryption and other techniques. The post Salt Typhoon ignites new federal push for mobile security best practices first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: A busy stock market week bookended by DeepSeek and Trump tariffs, by the numbers
item.description: News from China upset U.S. markets Monday and disrupted the frenzy that had built up around artificial intelligence.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: After alarming audit findings, here’s how HHS can overcome cloud security gaps
item.description: The report highlights the possibility of unauthorized access and control over critical systems. The post After alarming audit findings, here’s how HHS can overcome cloud security gaps first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network
